title: Title of multiparish prison
doc_html:
§802.  Title of multiparish prison

The multiparish prisons shall be known by the name of the parish in which the prison is domiciled, i.e., Ouachita Area Multiparish Prison.  

Amended by Acts 1970, No. 461, §1.
doc_text:
§802.  Title of multiparish prison
The multiparish prisons shall be known by the name of the parish in which the prison is domiciled, i.e., Ouachita Area Multiparish Prison.
Amended by Acts 1970, No. 461, §1.
